note: seq=42 (METRICS-CHANNELS, REVISED -- schema-introspective). LIVE/MINED channel split for the cockpit. The first cut hardcoded source_record.source_code + first_seen and FAILED step 4 against the live schema (real source_record exposes business_id/source|source_code/payload/ext_id, no guaranteed first_seen). This revision runs /opt/atlas/metrics/build_channel_views.py, which INTROSPECTS information_schema on the box, resolves the real source column (source_code|source|...) and any freshness timestamp column (first_seen|created_at|seen_at|...), reads DISTINCT source codes, and builds two SELECT-only views (atlas.v_channel_classification, atlas.v_channel_metrics). LIVE = real-time spine codes (CT/SSL/MX/NRD, live by construction) PLUS new-reg/license/EDGAR-FormD codes only when a freshness ts is within 72h; if NO freshness column exists those demote to MINED (never an unprovable same-day number). MINED = bulk/backfill. READ-ONLY: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW only -- no DDL on tables, no columns, no deletes; fully reversible (DROP VIEW); business_total unchanged. Allowlist-safe (every cmd starts with /opt/atlas/). HONEST: not run against live PG from the sandbox; py_compile clean + --selftest PASS (21 checks: classifier incl. mx_new/new_mx/ct-token cases, freshcol-present vs absent SQL, all-mined edge, no-DDL assertion). The box run prints CHANNEL_RESULT={...} with resolved columns + live/mined rollup. Wrapped by the puller restore-point->health->auto-rollback as usual.

steps.note: seq=42 REVISED: introspective LIVE/MINED views; resolves real column names; SELECT-only; safe to roll back (drops two views).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/metrics/build_channel_views.py':'53a3b235142a978d2f2e45e47a466a3c48bd1cfe7ab7ce74446f03c87c1bd823'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
